confirm.title: Are you absolutely sure?
confirm.deleteTransaction: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the transaction "{description}".
confirm.deleteRecurring: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the recurring transaction "{description}" and all its generated transactions from next month onwards. Transactions from the current month and past months will not be affected.
confirm.deleteCategory: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the category "{name}".
confirm.deleteTag: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the tag "{name}".

login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Please enter your new password below

authCode.title: Authentication Code
authCode.description: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.

recoveryCode.title: Recovery Code
recoveryCode.description: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.description: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verifyEmail.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Here you can get an overview of your financial activities and manage your transactions efficiently.
dashboard.availableBalanceDescription: Income minus paid expenses this month

calendar.earliestYear: You have reached the earliest available year.
calendar.latestYear: You have reached the latest available year.

empty.title: No transactions yet
empty.description: Start by creating your first transaction

create.title: Create Transaction
create.description: Fill in the details below to create a new transaction.

edit.title: Edit Transaction
edit.description: Fill in the details below to Edit a transaction.

duplicate.title: Duplicate Transaction
duplicate.description: Fill in the details below to Duplicate a transaction.

filter.title: Filter Transactions
filter.description: Refine your search by date range, category, or tags.

empty.title: No {type} transactions yet
empty.description: Start by creating your first recurring {type}

create.title: Create Recurring Transaction
create.description: Fill in the details below to create a new recurring transaction.

edit.title: Edit Recurring Transaction
edit.description: Make changes to {description}. Click save when you're done.

income.title: No income categories yet
income.description: Start by creating your first income category

expense.title: No expense categories yet
expense.description: Start by creating your first expense category

edit.title: Edit Category
edit.description: Make changes to {name}. Click save when you're done.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.heading: Profile information
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.resendVerification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.title: Password settings
password.heading: Update password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language you want to use in the application
language.label: Language

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Choose the currency for displaying your financial data

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningMessage: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.disabledDescription: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
twoFactor.enabledDescription: With two-factor authentication enabled, you will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.

recoveryCodes.title: 2FA Recovery Codes
recoveryCodes.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recoveryCodes.info: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click

setup.enabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
setup.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
setup.enableDescription: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app

empty.title: No tags yet
empty.description: Start by creating your first tag

edit.title: Edit Tag
edit.description: Make changes to {name}. Click save when you're done.

linkExpired.title: Link Expired or Invalid
linkExpired.subtitle: Error {status}
linkExpired.description: The shared link you are trying to access is no longer valid. It may have expired or the security signature is incorrect.
